prompt:
Write a short text that obeys ALL of these rules:
1. No word may start with the letter "C".
2. Do not use the word "engine".
3. Do not use any word longer than 8 letters.
4. Use between 35 and 46 words in total.
5. Include the word "planet" exactly 2 times.
6. Write exactly 2 sentences.

Output ONLY the text itself — no preamble, no quotes, no title, no explanation.

The output contains only the requested text.
